dialogos.texto_en: Ohh!\nThe night view is really just as beautiful as they say.
Y-yes! It really is pretty!
If the view is this beautiful from our room,\nI'm excited to see what the lounge looks like.
Y-yeah, me too!
Dinner was delicious too.\nI'm looking forward to the meals from tomorrow onward.
Oh! Yeah, um, what time is it now?\nLet me check my, uh, phone. Yeah, my phone!
Umm, Itsuki-chan?\nIs something wrong?
N-nothing...nothing in particular!
Well, it's just that you seem really fidgety.\nIs there something on your mind?
No, it's...uuh...nothing...\nEeer...ummm...
Ah!\nWh-what time should we turn off the lights?
Do we really need to decide?\nWe're not on a school trip,\nso we can sleep whenever we want.
A-alright...\nThen can I go out for a bit before bed?
Is it to visit Futaro-kun's room?
Ooh!
...That's right.\nI wanted to talk to Uesugi-kun.
Fine, see yaaa!
In any case, you could just stay overnight there, you know?
Whaaa!\nWhat are you even saying?!
Don't worry.\nFutaro-kun does have a single room, after all.
Don't worry about it. I'll make sure Nino and the others won't find out.
You don't need to do that!!\nI'm just going to talk to him!
Well, if you change your mind,\ndon't hesitate to let me know.
It won't change! Jeez!\nI'm leaving now!
Heh, Itsuki-chan going to Futaro-kun's room \nat this hour, huh.
She's becoming quite assertive,\nisn't she? It's a good thing.
